sources.notes: Easy version of chain prefix rank on a tree.
Official tutorial derives a tree DP over chain prefixes and rank counts.

annotation.summary: Compute/count prefix ranks of chains in a tree under easier constraints.
annotation.constraints: Easy version permits quadratic or heavier subtree DP over all chain endpoints.
annotation.core_idea: Root the tree and consider chains by their top endpoint. The rank of a prefix can be computed from subtree sizes/order statistics along the chain. A DP over tree nodes accumulates the number of chains with each rank contribution, combining children one by one with combinatorial coefficients.

solution_variants.name: quadratic-tree-dp
solution_variants.summary: Compute chain-prefix contributions with a rooted tree DP that keeps rank/count tables.

tags.evidence: The solution is a DP over tree nodes/children.
The objects being counted are chains/prefixes in a tree.
Child contributions are combined with combinatorial coefficients.
